titleStmt.title: SII 9.11: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 11. (A.R. No. 543 of 1906.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN A FIELD IN FRONT OF THE VILLAGE CHADALLA, ON PUNGANUR-CHADUM ROAD, SAME ZAMINDARI AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This undated record refers itself to the reign of the Bāṇa king Mahāvali-Bāṇarasa. It states that when some one was ruling Valla, situated in Baḍugavaḻi, and when Bāṇarasa led a campaign on behalf of Permānaḍigaḷ against the Noḻamba, Rāchamalla and Mayindaḍi, Mādhavarasa of Kinganūr fought and, having slain a number of men and horses in the battle of Sōremaḍi, died. In recognition of his service the king bestowed (upon his family) land of three khamba.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . sakala�gatrayābhivanditasurāsurādhīśapara
mēśvarapratihārīkṛtamahāvalikolōtbhava śrī
mahāvalibāṇarasarprithuvīrājyaṅgeye baḍu
gavaḻiyinpa vallamāḷutti
re permmānaḍigaḷgāgi bāṇarasar noḻambanā rā
camallana mayindaḍiyā mēgeḻdu sōremaḍiya
kāḷegadoḷ kuṅganūra mādhavarasa kāḷappa
nāmmaga palavuṁ kudureyaṁ
mānasarumāniṟidu biḻdoḍe mecci mūru kha
mba sarvabādapariyāra kalani prasādage
ydāridāndōrva naḻidon™ pañcamāpātakanakku .
Digital edition of SII 9.11 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
